headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://res.cloudinary.com; media-src https://res.cloudinary.com; frame-src https://player.vimeo.com https://www.youtube.com; connect-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
